meaning: 1. length; 2. duration; 3. accident; 4. right and wrong; 5. good and b
sentence: 你帮我量一下这块布的长短。
pinyin: Nǐ bāng wǒ liáng yīxià zhè kuài bù de chángduǎn.
english: Could you measure the length of this piece of fabric for me?

sentence: 这种药是胶囊形式的，比较好吞。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yào shì jiāo náng xíng shì de, bǐ jiào hǎo tūn.
english: This medicine comes in capsule form, which is easier to swallow.

sentence: 古代的官吏必须通过科举考试。
pinyin: Gǔdài de guānlì bìxū tōngguò kējǔ kǎoshì.
english: Ancient officials had to pass the imperial examination.

sentence: 孩子的监护权判给了母亲。
pinyin: Háizi de jiānhù quán pàn gěile mǔqīn.
english: Guardianship of the child was awarded to the mother.

meaning: 1. according to this; 2. on the ground of the above; 3. (formally intr
sentence: 据此，我们决定调整计划。
pinyin: Jù cǐ, wǒmen juédìng tiáozhěng jìhuà.
english: Accordingly, we decided to adjust the plan.
